text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital and I spot a crowd of people by the
academy gates while we're cooling down.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hm... It looks like there's a crowd of fans
surrounding Falco!

text_block_list.name: Falco Fans
text_block_list.text:
You're so cute today, Falco!
Ummm! You're always so radiant...
I love you! You're so cool when you run!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I know... Like, I sooo feel the same. I'd register
Falco as a world heritage personality if I could.

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text: Oh! Oh my gosh, it's the Agnes Digital! No one understands us otaku like you—you're a goddess among goddesses!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyaaagh?! Um, a-a-and you are?

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm just your typical Umamusume otaku! Sorry
to bother you all of a sudden, heehee.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, so you're a Falco fan! You've been waiting
for her as well, huh?

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text:
...Actually, I am eternally and forever, day and
night, the ultimate Digital fan!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?! Me?! But... why?! I mean... but why?!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text:
Because wherever I go, wherever I look... you're
always there.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huehue... Cafe time with your bestie! ♪ Aw, no
fair! Look at them spoon-feeding each other!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text:
That girl totally gets it! She knows what a treasure
chest of ecstasy afternoon tea is!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, glory be! Glory be! Today again, I get to
feast my eyes one of life's most supreme delights.

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text: Her again...

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text:
Look at her... how she gazes so intently at her
oshi, all while keeping optimal distance so as not
to intrude.

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text: She's the real deal!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text:
I respect you as a kindred spirit, and, more than
that, you set my heart aflutter!

text_block_list.name: High School Girl
text_block_list.text:
All the feelings you inspire in me are captured in
this letter. Please take it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This letter she gave me is practically a novel! Not
only that, she included official prints from the
legendary one-night-only Umamusume unit event!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've got such a dependable kindred spirit looking
over me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, my comrade! I'll take this energy from
your support and pour it all into my oshis!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital's spirits soar high after receiving
the gift from her fan.
